void register() {
  Gobl()
  ..register(name: Client.ENTITY_NAME, columns: Client.COLUMNS, entity: Client)
  ..register(name: Account.ENTITY_NAME, columns: Account.COLUMNS, entity: Account)
  ..register(name: Transaction.ENTITY_NAME, columns: Transaction.COLUMNS, entity: Transaction)
  ..register(name: Currency.ENTITY_NAME, columns: Currency.COLUMNS, entity: Currency);
}
